channel.title: jb-marketplace-plugins-jetbrains
channel.description: The latest JetBrains plugins on the JetBrains marketplace
channel.dc:creator: Jonathan Lermitage

item.title: Unicode Guard - Fri Jun 12 14:17:47 UTC 2026
item.description:
The Unicode Insight plugin helps developers detect and manage potentially dangerous or invisible Unicode characters in their source code. It provides tools to prevent...
vendor: Anbora Labs downloads: 4 pricingModel: PAID xmlId: co.anbora.labs.unicode.guard

item.title: XsdViewer - Mon Jun 15 17:41:25 UTC 2026
item.description:
A simple XSD viewer for IntelliJ IDEA. Supports tree view, documentation tooltips, and searching within the XSD structure.
vendor: Jonathan Korol downloads: 1 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: fr.korol.xsdViewer

item.title: Hoverfly - Sun Jun 14 12:47:28 UTC 2026
item.description:
Language support for Hoverfly simulation files. Adds diagnostics, completions, hover documentation, and semantic highlighting for Hoverfly JSON simulation files...
vendor: Jean-Baptiste Terrazzoni downloads: 1 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.jterrazz.hoverfly-lsp

item.title: Copilot Cost Lens - Sat Jun 13 16:31:57 UTC 2026
item.description:

vendor: Jakub Jirák downloads: 2 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.jakubjirak.copilotcostlens

item.title: BoxBreaker (BBK) - Sun Jun 14 22:43:43 UTC 2026
item.description:

vendor: NicoLarena downloads: 2 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.larena.boxbreaker.bbk

item.title: Elixir Pro - Sun Jun 14 09:51:23 UTC 2026
